allow: Bash(python3 -c "import math; desc = math.atan\(0.5\) * 180 / math.pi; asc = 180 - desc; print\(f''ISO_ANGLE_DESC \(atan\(0.5\)\): {desc:.2f}°''\); print\(f''ISO_ANGLE_ASC \(180 - atan\(0.5\)\): {asc:.2f}°''\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ItemProperty ''HKCU:\\Control Panel\\Desktop'' -Name LogPixels -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty LogPixels; \(Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_VideoController\).CurrentHorizontalResolution; \(Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_VideoController\).CurrentVerticalResolution")
